name: githubapp
description: A simple Node.js app to handle Ringio calling integration

scripts.dev1environment: export NODE_ENV=dev1 && pm2 start src/app.js -i 1 --node-args=--max_old_space_size=3000  && pm2 logs
scripts.dev2environment: export NODE_ENV=dev2 && pm2 start src/app.js -i 1 --node-args=--max_old_space_size=3000  && pm2 logs
scripts.prodenvironment: export NODE_ENV=prod && pm2 start src/app.js -i 1 --node-args=--max_old_space_size=3000  && pm2 logs

author: Mohit Bansal
